page_title: Documents for Express Entry: Proof of funds - Canada.ca

h2: We updated the amount of money you need
h3: Who doesn't need proof of funds
You must have legal access to the funds

sections.heading: We updated the amount of money you need
items: We updated the table that shows how much money you need to settle in Canada.
To stay eligible, you may need to update your proof of funds in your Express Entry profile. The update must be done no later than July 28, 2025 .
bullets: We update these numbers every year, based on 50% of the low income cut-off totals.
Updating your profile doesn’t change the date and time that we received it, so you’ll keep your rank if you’re in a tie-breaker situation.

sections.heading: On this page
bullets: Who needs proof of funds
How much money you need
What we accept as proof

sections.heading: Who needs proof of funds
items: Proof of funds is how you show us that you have enough money to settle in Canada. If we invite you to apply, you must give written proof that you have this money.
You need proof of funds to meet the minimum requirements of the:
bullets: Federal Skilled Worker Program
Federal Skilled Trades Program

sections.heading: Who doesn't need proof of funds
How much money you need
items: The amount of money you need to support your family is based the size of your family.
This table shows the minimum amount you need to immigrate to Canada. If you have more money, you should list the full amount in your profile or application.

sections.heading: What we accept as proof
items: Your funds must be available to you both when:
bullets: you apply
we issue you a permanent resident visa (if we approve your application)

sections.heading: You need a bank letter
items: For proof, you must get official letters from any banks or financial institutions where you have an account.
These letters must be printed on the financial institution’s letterhead and include:
bullets: the bank or institution’s contact information (address, telephone number and email address)
your name
your outstanding debts (such as credit card debts and loans)
these details for each current banking and investment account you have with them: account numbers date each account was opened current account balances average balance for the past 6 months
account numbers
date each account was opened
current account balances
average balance for the past 6 months

sections.heading: You must have legal access to the funds
items: You must prove to us that you can legally access the money here when you arrive.
You must be able to use this money to pay for your family’s costs of living (even if they aren’t coming with you).
bullets: you can't use equity on real property as proof of settlement funds
you can’t borrow this money from another person
If your spouse is coming with you, you can count money you have together in a joint account.
You may be able to count money in an account under your spouse’s name only, but you must prove you have access to the money.
